title: 心舞
description:
“Sweet Dance” is a next-generation 3D dress-up rhythm dance game that seamlessly blends music, dance, social interaction, character development, diverse outfit customization, and multiple gameplay modes. Featuring cutting-edge high-fidelity character models, it offers a vast collection of fashionable outfits to mix and match at will. The game brings popular trending dance moves and viral TikTok hits to life, waiting for you to unlock and enjoy. With a brand-new social discovery system, you can connect with new friends anytime and ignite romantic encounters. Additionally, "Sweet Dance" offers over a thousand stylish outfits, along with stunning mounts and richly detailed scenes, ensuring players enjoy a wide variety of choices and endless entertainment.

A massive library of tracks! 6 different music gameplay modes, dynamic and dazzling dance moves, let your talent shine at your fingertips, and immerse yourself in the world of rhythm.

In the game, there are tens of thousands of outfit combinations, thousands of accessories, and mounts to choose from. The only limit to your style is your imagination.

Dozens of sprites accompany you in the game. You can catch them, ride them, or even transform into them — discover unexpected fun and surprises!

Interaction is the timeless core of the game. You can send dance party invitations, ride mounts together, perform interactive actions, and exchange gifts with each other.

Interaction is the timeless core of the game. You can send dance party invitations, ride mounts together, perform interactive actions, and exchange gifts with each other.
description_short: A next-gen 3D dress-up rhythm dance game. Mix and match a vast collection of fashionable outfits, master the hottest dance moves, and unlock trending TikTok hits. Meet new friends and embark on a sweet romantic journey!
